item.name: Banded Candiru
item.description:
A deceptive wavekin that utilizes its striking scales to deter predators.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This variety of candiru is wreathed in scales of black and yellow─a common coloration observed in venomous wavekin. Though these hues advise predators to think twice before eating it, banded candirus are, in fact, scrumptious and completely devoid of toxins.
